subject: [PATCH v9 09/15] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT plumbing

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to the Linux kernel's userfaultfd (UFFD) system, which allows userspace to track read-write protection (RWP) on memory ranges. The patch introduces two new UFFD ioctls: UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT, which enable RWP tracking and allow userspace to install or remove RWP on a range. The feature is not yet advertised and requires the CONFIG_USERFAULTFD_RWP symbol to be set. The patch also includes documentation updates and changes to various kernel files.
